basic_details.job_title: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Administrative Officer, Field Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER)
basic_details.post_name: Administrative Officer, Field Officer and More
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER) Health Technology Assessment in India (HTAIn) – Technical Resource Centre (TRC) Notification 2026 has been released on 27-05-2026 on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NIPER Hajipur Health Technology Assessment in India (HTAIn) – Technical Resource Centre (TRC) Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be communicated through email/Institute website

age_limit.details: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): Maximum age 40 years. Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: Maximum age 45 years. Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: Maximum age 40 years. Administrative Officer: Maximum age 50 years (relaxable for Government servants and SC/ST/OBC up to 5 years). Field Officer: Maximum age 35 years. Field Investigator: Maximum age 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Health Economics/Economics/Public Health/Community Medicine with specialization in Healthcare Costing, Economic Evaluation for Health Economist. For Scientist D/C, MBBS with relevant experience or Post Graduate Degree in relevant subject. For Administrative Officer, Bachelor's Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or Retired Officer. For Field Officer/Investigator, Graduate in Science with 3 years experience or Master's degree or Pharm D.
qualification.details: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): Masters in Health Economics/ Economics/ Public Health/Community Medicine with specialization in Healthcare Costing, Economic Evaluation. Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/MPH) after MBBS with 6 years research experience in the relevant field; OR MBBS degree with 8 years' experience or Post Graduate Diploma in medical subjects after MBBS with 5 years' experience in the relevant subject; OR Ph. D in the relevant subject from a recognized university with 5 years' experience in the relevant field. PLUS 2 years' experience in the management of R & D projects in a team effectively. Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: Medical: MBBS degree with 6 years' experience or Post Graduate Diploma in medical subjects after MBBS with 5 years' experience in relevant subject; OR Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/MPH) after MBBS with 4 years research experience in relevant field. Non-Medical: Ph.D. degree in Microbiology/Biochemistry/Biotechnology subject from a recognized University with 5 years R&D/Teaching experience in relevant subject after Ph.D.; OR First class MPH/ Pharm D/Master's degree in the relevant subjects from a recognized university with 8 years R&D/teaching experience in the relevant subject after 1st Class Master's Degree; OR Second class M.Sc/MPH + Ph.D degree in the relevant subject from a recognized University with 8 years R&D/teaching experience in the relevant subject post qualification. PLUS 2 years experience in the management of R & D projects in a team effectively. Administrative Officer: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent, with minimum 03 years of experience under the Government Department/Statutory or Autonomous bodies/Universities/Public Sector undertakings and having knowledge of MS Office, Ms Word, MS Power Point and MS Excel; OR Retired Officers of the rank of Section Officer/Under Secretary to the Government of India. Field Officer: Graduate in Science/ relevant subjects from a recognized university with 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution or master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution. Field Investigator: Graduate in Science/ relevant subjects from a recognized university with 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution or master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution.

salary_details.pay_scale: Ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 78,000/- per month plus HRA for some posts.
salary_details.details: Health Economist (Level of Scientist C): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA Scientist D (Medical/Non-Medical) / Senior Research Officer: Rs. 78,000/- + HRA Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical) / Research Officer: Rs. 67,000/- + HRA Administrative Officer: Rs. 40,000/- per month Field Officer: Rs. 25,000 – 30,000/- per month Field Investigator: Rs. 30,000 – 32,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting Written test Skill test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIPER Hajipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
